neighbors.name: Brenden & Amber Linendoll
neighbors.claims: Amber Linendoll serves as an Animal Control Officer with the Cochise County Sheriff's Office ([openpayrolls.com](https://openpayrolls.com/county/cochise-county-az/2022/page-3#:~:text=Amber%20Linendoll%20%20%282022%20,Judicial)). She spoke out against a proposed large-scale pet breeding facility in the county, citing concerns that existing backyard breeders already strain local animal control resources ([thisistucson.com](https://thisistucson.com/news/local/article_6cdfdc18-b1ac-11eb-8792-37fe774e2a26.html?mode=nowapp#:~:text=Animal%20control%20officer%20Amber%20Linendoll%2C,to%20pick%20up%20the%20dogs)). Brenden Linendoll, co-owner of their property, maintains a private profile with no noted public activities.

approach_recommendations.engage: Coordinate via the Sheriff's Office or community safety channels to acknowledge Amber's animal welfare concerns, and reassure them how the project will be managed to avoid burdening local resources.

overview_summary: One profiled neighbor - a county employee with medium influence.
